entry.title: A Glimpse Beyond This Illusion
entry.summary:
Author: untoldchaos

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,142Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: A gunshot rang out.Or maybe it was the slamming of a cage door.Buck jolted, thrashing out violently and hitting something hard beside him.“I’m Derek!” He yelled out desperately; the memory of the sharp, biting sting of the taser still fresh in his mind and against his skin.“Buck! Hey, it’s okay. You’re okay. I’m here.”Or,The car, in fact, does not make it the final 10 hours back to LA, and Buck and Eddie have to stay in a motel.

entry.title: Last chances and second glances
entry.summary:
Author: thebookofcrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 169,626Chapters: 50/60Kudos: 874

Summary: St. Anthony’s was his last chance, and Evan knew that. He had been kicked out of five schools in the past six years, and after his sophomore year ended with a meeting between his parents and his last headmaster that could be summarized with: “we’re not kicking him out, but just know that Evan is not welcome back in September.” His parents wanted to send him to military school.       Evan knew he couldn’t survive military school, that would be his last drop, the one that finally shattered the vase. He couldn’t be the type of person that would be able to put himself back together once they broke him down.     This had to work. . . . Buck is the new kid in an El Paso boarding school, trying his best to stay out of trouble. Eddie is a rockstar (in the world of high school popularity) he's captain to the football team, he's dating the most popular girl in school, and looking at a full ride sports scholarship in the fall. He should feel like he won at life, which is why he doesn't understand why the only time he feels alive is when he catches a glimpse of the new guy on the running team. Or in simpler terms: Buddie high-school AU!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: disillusionment
entry.summary:
Author: Mapping_Marauders

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,777Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 14

Summary: "Eddie. Eddie, wait," Buck calls after his retreating form. He watches as Eddie's shoulders stiffen, the muscles of his back tightening before he turns around once more, jaw and fists clenched.  "I'm not going to tell you again—" "What year is it?" Buck asks, swallowing harshly against the taste of his own panic. It's just a precaution. Most likely, there's a perfectly normal and logical explanation for this. The question makes Eddie pause, expression shifting to one of bewilderment. "What?" Buck exhales harshly, breaths ragged and forceful. "Last time I—uh, you didn't have a moustache the last time I saw you." The silence is fucking loud. So is Eddie's face, because it's doing a weird hop-skip-jump between about seven conflicting emotions, screwing up and relaxing and squinting again. He chuckles nervously. "What do you mean? Buck, I had a moustache yesterday. It hasn't grown in overnight, you've seen it before—" "No, I haven't." Or,After the lightning strike, Buck finds himself cycling though a select portion of possible lives he might have lived. Coincidentally, they all seem to have one thing in common...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: electricity 2 : Evan Buckley 0
entry.summary:
Author: Diazstrdst (Aphrosephone118)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,281Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 127

Summary: "Buck tries to yell, tries to shout for help, but his voice isn't working and he feels really weird. His body is starting to tremor, and his limbs are starting to move of their own accord, shaking violently against the hardwood. The darkness has almost taken over Buck's vision when he hears a terrified shout of his name close by, and suddenly there's a person hovering over him, talking to him, staring down at him." OR What if the cattle prod gives Buck lasting effects that reopen a closed wound from years ago? Because being struck by lightning and then electrocuted only a few years later cannon be good for Buck's heart.

entry.title: Next of Kin
entry.summary:
Author: Snappeasaregreen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,036Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Buck, Eddie, and Chris go on a road trip for Chris's graduation!A near fatal car crash ensues and they're all brought in separately, Eddie gets the least damage, Chris is knocked out for a few days but overall okay, but Buck is in the worst condition and needs to be put into a medically induced coma for a week. No phones to contact anyone for a few days and desperate to just see him alive, Eddie tells the staff that Buck is his husband to get into the room and realizations ensue. Told mainly from Eddie's POVEddie may be out of character in this fic but he's in his newly not repressed one sided love self hating era so we're ignoring it :DI am pulling every medical thing out of my ass suspend your disbelief Incomplete and being updated as I edit each chapter I started this in August but decided to finally start posting it in honor of the next episode being a road trip in which something happens to Buck.

entry.title: Crawling Back To You
entry.summary:
Author: marry_rites

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,359Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 154

Summary: “You look like hell,” he rasped, voice almost gone at this point.   “You should see the other guy,” Eddie quipped back just as quickly and Buck laughed—he laughed because it was that easy to fall apart in front of Eddie because it was that easy for Eddie to find him and cradle him and make him laugh.   “I am the other guy,” he shot back, wanting to hear Eddie’s voice. He wanted to tell Eddie to keep speaking because if Eddie stopped and Buck closed his eyes then he would be back in that goddamn house, behind the bars and—   “I know,” Eddie said in a softer voice than before and if Buck’s eyes were open, he would be able to see just how deep that gentleness—that softness ran…maybe in the tips of his fingers that were still firmly pressed against Buck’s pulse or the warmth of his hand that was still cradling Buck’s head or his eyes that had mellowed into something affectionate despite the sharp heat of the dessert.   He didn’t see any of that but the voice was enough to make him feel like all his walls were crumbling. Eddie was really here.   OR They always find their way back to each other no matter what.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Right at Home (With Perfect Timing)
entry.summary:
Author: shanparkervarietyhour

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,549Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 380

Summary: Chris gives him a look holding the type of ire you can only receive from a teenager. “No…” he says as if it’s the most obvious thing in the world. “You’re my other dad.” Buck feels his throat tighten and his eyes prickle. He tries not to show it - he knows he will immediately drain any coolness cache he has left with Chris if he does. He basks in the honor of Chris considering him for any kind of paternal role for a moment before the other half of the equation dawns on him. “Wait…you told her I’m married to your dad?” —- Chris convinces Buck to pretend to be married to Eddie to impress his classmate.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Buck Effect
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionwriter

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,840Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 4

Summary: Science has said that one singular event can ultimately result in later much larger consequences. Eddie Diaz discovers the truth of this when he meets Evan (Buck) Buckley, and the trajectory of his life changes forever. It’s 1920 and the Great War has ended. Eddie Diaz, with his son Christopher, make the decision to move from Texas to the growing metropolis of Los Angeles. Former Army medic Eddie has a new job, a new career and, he hopes, a new direction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
